ItacAcademyItem.Name: Filaleti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Apparently, this Academy was founded by Battista Nani in Giudecca. The following letter was addressed to the Academy: Carlo Roberto Dati: Lettera a Filaleti di Timauro Antiate della vera storia della cicloide, e della famosissima esperienza dell`argento vivo (In Firenze: all`insegna della Stella, 1663).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
